title: KABOOM!
body:
This mods adds **dynamites** which is a new type of explosives that you can throw. The dynamites have 5 second fusing animation before exploding!

Other than that a new villager profession is added called **pyrotechnist**. The pyrotechnist profession can be given to a villager with the **combustion table**.


__________________________________________________
